title: ruta congesta
intro: Ruta congesta, also known as garden rue, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Rutaceae, native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Ruta congesta include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. Ruta congesta can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
